scripts.setup: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && node scripts/setup-config.js
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --prefix server" "wait-on -t 30000 http-get://127.0.0.1:5001/api/config && npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run start --prefix server
